creator: pvoigt@uos.de
text:
(In reply to Jeremy Chadwick from comment #1)
Thank you very much for your detailed analysis.

In a parallel way I have been told by Baptiste via the mailing list that he could not reproduce (anymore) the error with version 5.5.1. He asked me to test myself.

Meanwhile, I could have tested version 5.5.1 and can confirm that the error has been fixed.
